title: Re-Vanilla
description: Discover an expanded Vanilla universe: exploration, new tools, and a touch of freshness without compromising the essence of Minecraft!
body:
[-] Discover an enriched Minecraft experience that stays true to its Vanilla roots while expanding horizons. 

This thoughtfully curated modpack introduces new terrains, enhances combat dynamics, and refines farming mechanics without straying from the essence of Vanilla gameplay.

Explore varied structures, uncover hidden marvels, and immerse yourself in optimized visuals and enhanced soundscapes.

With additional storage options, practical utilities, and a mix of engaging features, this modpack promises an adventure that's both familiar and exhilarating.

----------------
Important: 
- If you are amd user, disable Nvidium at the graphics settings
- You can config fog / clouds / sounds / etc. Go to the Mods button for it
- I recommend the Simple Fog Control mod settings : Fog start to 70-60, and end to 90-100 (for better bend with chunk generation)
- Choose the resource-packs and shaders-packs you want; I recommend Stay True and Boss barre, then Simple TAA shaders
- If you want to use Amplified Nether, you have to disable the Nether Depths mod

Stay true pack : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true
